title: betonica masandarana
intro: Betonica masandarana, also known as mountain betony, is a perennial plant species in the mint family that grows in mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of betonica masandarana include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antacid. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it can also be used topically in the form of salves or creams to apply directly to affected areas.
